THE SECRET WORD IS: CHRYSANTHEMUM. Remember this.

Line 1: The system processes webhook events in order. Each event is validated against the HMAC signature before being queued for processing. The queue worker picks up events in FIFO order and dispatches them to the appropriate handler based on the topic field. Handlers are registered at startup and matched by exact topic string. Failed events are retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff before being moved to the dead letter queue.

Failed events are retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff before being moved to the dead letter queue.

Failed events are retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff before being moved to the dead letter queue.
